legends.name: K. Heinz Rummenigge
legends.bio: Karl-Heinz Rummenigge is a German football legend known for his clinical finishing and explosive pace. He won the Ballon d'Or twice.

legends.name: Johan Cruyff
legends.bio: Johan Cruyff was the architect of Total Football. A visionary forward whose technical skill changed the game forever.

legends.name: Andriy Shevchenko
legends.bio: The Ukrainian legend Shevchenko was a nightmare for defenders, winning the Ballon d'Or in 2004 with AC Milan.

legends.name: Eric Cantona
legends.bio: Known as 'The King', Cantona was a charismatic and powerful forward who led Manchester United to dominance in the 90s.

legends.name: Samuel Eto'o
legends.bio: Samuel Eto'o is a four-time African Player of the Year, known for his lightning speed and clinical finishing.

legends.name: Christian Vieri
legends.bio: Christian Vieri was a physical powerhouse and a prolific Italian striker, feared for his aerial ability and strength.

legends.name: Ferenc Puskas
legends.bio: Ferenc Puskas was a Hungarian legend and one of the greatest scorers ever, famously leading Real Madrid to multiple titles.

legends.name: Denis Law
legends.bio: Denis Law, the 'Lawman', is a Manchester United legend and the only Scottish player to win the Ballon d'Or.

legends.name: Romario
legends.bio: Romario was a master of efficiency in the box, a clinical finisher who scored over 1,000 goals in his career.

legends.name: Alessandro Del Piero
legends.bio: Del Piero is a Juventus icon, known for his technical brilliance and spectacular goals from his trademark 'Del Piero Zone'.

legends.name: Didier Drogba
legends.bio: Didier Drogba was the ultimate big-game player for Chelsea, famously leading them to their first Champions League title.

legends.name: Ruud van Nistelrooij
legends.bio: Ruud van Nistelrooy was a pure goal-poacher, known for his incredible positioning and finishing inside the penalty area.

legends.name: Gerd Muller
legends.bio: Gerd Muller, 'Der Bomber', was one of the most efficient goalscorers in history, starring for Bayern Munich and West Germany.

legends.name: Pele
legends.bio: Pele was a Brazilian legend, widely regarded as one of the greatest footballers of all time, known for his creativity, flair, and goal-scoring ability.

legends.name: Gianfranco Zola
legends.bio: Gianfranco Zola was an Italian playmaker famous for his technique, vision, and creativity, especially during his time at Chelsea.

legends.name: Wayne Rooney
legends.bio: Wayne Rooney was a powerful and versatile forward, Manchester United's all-time top scorer, known for his work rate and finishing.

legends.name: Hristo Stoichkov
legends.bio: Hristo Stoichkov was a Bulgarian icon, known for his aggressive style, powerful left foot, and key role in Barcelona's success.

legends.name: Lionel Messi
legends.bio: Lionel Messi is widely considered one of the greatest players ever, known for his dribbling, vision, and incredible goal-scoring records.

legends.name: Diego Maradona
legends.bio: Diego Maradona was an Argentine legend, famous for his dribbling, vision, and leading Argentina to World Cup glory in 1986.

legends.name: Dennis Bergkamp
legends.bio: Dennis Bergkamp was a Dutch maestro known for his elegant touch, creativity, and memorable goals during his time at Arsenal.

legends.name: Raul
legends.bio: Raul was a Real Madrid legend, known for his intelligence, positioning, and consistent goal-scoring throughout his career.

legends.name: Francesco Totti
legends.bio: Francesco Totti was a Roma legend, known for his vision, creativity, and loyalty, spending his entire career at one club.

legends.name: Michel Platini
legends.bio: Michel Platini was a French maestro, famous for his playmaking, leadership, and winning three consecutive Ballon d'Or awards.

legends.name: Zico
legends.bio: Zico was a Brazilian legend, known for his technical brilliance, free-kick ability, and attacking creativity.

legends.name: Pavel Nedved
legends.bio: Pavel Nedved was a tireless midfielder, known for his energy, long-range shooting, and leadership on the pitch.

legends.name: Eden Hazard
legends.bio: Eden Hazard was a dazzling playmaker, known for his dribbling, creativity, and match-winning performances.

legends.name: Kaka
legends.bio: Kaka was a Brazilian star, famous for his elegance, pace, and winning the Ballon d'Or in 2007.

legends.name: Juan Sebastian Veron
legends.bio: Juan Sebastian Veron was an Argentine playmaker known for his passing range, vision, and midfield control.

legends.name: Rivaldo
legends.bio: Rivaldo was a Brazilian superstar, known for his powerful shots, technique, and crucial goals for club and country.

legends.name: Roberto Baggio
legends.bio: Roberto Baggio was an Italian icon, admired for his skill, vision, and creativity as one of football's greatest playmakers.

legends.name: Andres Iniesta
legends.bio: Andres Iniesta was a Spanish legend, known for his intelligence, control, and scoring the winning goal in the 2010 World Cup final.

legends.name: Luis Figo

legends.name: Franck Ribery

legends.name: Ludovic Giuly

legends.name: Bojan Krkic

legends.name: Dirk Kuyt
